rss-desc: Waxay ku soo bandhigtaa RSS feeds bogagga MediaWiki qaab caadi ah ama qaab uu isticmaaluhu qeexan karo iyadoo la adeegsanayo bogag tusmada ah
rss-error: Waa ku guuldareystay in la soo shubo RSS feed-ka $1: $2
rss-empty: Waa ku guuldareystay in la soo shubo RSS feed-ka $1!
rss-fetch-nourl: Fetch waxaa la wacay iyada oo aan URL lahayn!
rss-parse-error: Khalad ku yimid falanqaynta XML ee RSS
rss-url-is-not-allowed: "$1" kuma jiro liiska feeds-ka la oggol yahay. {{PLURAL:$3|$2 waa feed-ka kaliya ee la oggol yahay|Feeds-ka la oggol yahay waa sida soo socota: $2}}.
rss-empty-allow-list: "$1" kuma jiro liiska feeds-ka la oggol yahay. Ma jiraan URL-yada feed-ka ee la oggol yahay ee liiska ku jira.
rss-deprecated-wgrssallowedfeeds-found: Doorsoomaha la joojiyay ee <var>$wgRSSAllowedFeeds</var> ayaa la ogaaday. Tan iyo RSS version 2.0 waa in lagu beddelaa <var>$wgRSSUrlWhitelist</var> sida lagu sharaxay bogga buugga [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:RSS Extension:RSS].
